text.title: Embeddings Model Selection — Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from input brief to signed-off output decision-record.

list.item: Input: Domain queries + ground-truth relevant docs.
Decision gate: If you can't build eval, you can't pick a model — pause.
Action: Score 4-6 candidate models on (fit, constraints, capabilities).
Decision gate: If no model wins 2+ axes, your constraints conflict — clarify.
Action: Embed eval set, compute recall@5, recall@10.
Decision gate: If results are within 1pp, pick the cheaper / more privacy-friendly.
Action: Pick winner; list ≥2 rejected with reason.
Decision gate: If only 1 candidate ran, eval is incomplete.
Decision gate: If embeddings evolve fast (new SOTA every quarter), shorten review to 3 months.
